## PaginationOptions.all property

When true, return every matching item ignoring --limit/--offset. Safe for queries that fit in memory; the entire match set is materialized server-side. Mutually exclusive with `limit` and `offset`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
all?: boolean | undefined;
```
